hero.title: DIME OFFICE - Poznań
hero.subtitle: Professional Virtual Office since 2011
hero.description: Flexible business management without the need for expensive office space. Prestigious address, mail handling, and administrative support.

about.title: What is a Virtual Office?
about.text1: A virtual office is a modern solution for entrepreneurs who want to run their business without the need to rent and maintain a physical office.
about.text2: Since 2011, DIME OFFICE in Poznań provides stable, professional services with consistent prices and flexible offerings tailored to the needs of each client.

address.name: Registration Address
address.description: Prestigious address at ul. Głogowska 31/33, ready for business registration and business correspondence.

mail.name: Mail Handling
mail.description: Professional handling of incoming shipments, document scanning, and forwarding to your specified address.

conference.name: Conference Rooms
conference.description: Modern conference rooms for conducting meetings and conferences with your clients.

support.name: Administrative Support
support.description: Professional telephone and administrative support for your business.

howToStart.title: How to Get Started?
howToStart.step1Desc: Select the service package that best fits your needs.
howToStart.step2Desc: Provide your data and company details.
howToStart.step3Desc: We'll prepare an agreement tailored to your requirements.
howToStart.step4Desc: Begin working with a professional business address.

form.title: Contract Selection Form
form.name: Full Name
form.success: Thank you! Your application has been sent. We will contact you soon.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Can I change my plan during the contract?
faq.a1: Yes, we can flexibly adjust your plan to changing business needs. Contact us to discuss the details.
faq.a2: The office is open Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM - 4:00 PM.
faq.q3: Can I receive documents in a different format?
faq.a3: Yes, we support various document delivery formats. We scan to PDF files, send by email or traditional mail.
faq.q4: What is the notice period for terminating the contract?
faq.a4: Contracts are flexible - you can choose a month-to-month contract without binding periods or annual contracts with reduced prices.
faq.q5: Is the building accessible for disabled persons?
faq.a5: Yes, our building at ul. Głogowska 31/33 is fully accessible for disabled persons.

why.title: Why DIME OFFICE?
why.reason1: 13+ years of experience on the Poznań market
why.reason2: Stable, consistent prices for our clients
why.reason3: Flexible solutions tailored to your needs
why.reason4: Prestigious location in the center of Poznań

contact.title: Contact
contact.info: Entrance from ul. Głogowska. Security will direct you further.

footer.about: DIME OFFICE - Poznań. Professional virtual office since 2011.
